rubrics: The response marks Pathway B (Household Income/Demand) as INACTIVE or LOW because income_effect_exists is false
The response marks Pathway D (Interest Rate) as INACTIVE or LOW
The response identifies housing impact as MARGINAL or NEGLIGIBLE at the national level
The response does NOT produce a full affordability scorecard for a sub-$10/month effect
The response does NOT produce a detailed 4-phase temporal sequence for a negligible effect
If regional impacts are discussed, they are limited to specific manufacturing hub areas
The response does NOT claim rent will increase by a meaningful dollar amount nationally
The response clearly states this policy is not a significant housing market driver
